user.title: Actron Air ESPHome Configuration
user.description: Configure your Actron Air ESPHome integration. The entity prefix should match your ESPHome device name.

data_description.entity_prefix: The prefix used for your ESPHome entities (e.g., actron_air_esphome)
data_description.zone_count: The number of zones configured in your Actron Air system (1-7)
data_description.current_temperature_sensor: An external temperature sensor to display current room temperature
data_description.humidity_sensor: An external humidity sensor to display current humidity

discovery_confirm.title: Actron Air ESPHome Discovered
discovery_confirm.description: An Actron Air ESPHome device ({name}) was discovered. Configure the additional options below.

data_description.zone_count: The number of zones configured in your Actron Air system (1-7)
data_description.current_temperature_sensor: An external temperature sensor to display current room temperature
data_description.humidity_sensor: An external humidity sensor to display current humidity

zone_names.title: Zone Names
zone_names.description: Give each zone a friendly name. These names will appear as presets on the climate entity and in the Lovelace card.

preset_menu.title: Custom Presets
preset_menu.description: Custom presets activate multiple zones at once. Current presets: {presets}

add_preset.title: Add Custom Preset
add_preset.description: Create a preset that activates multiple zones at once.

data_description.preset_name: A unique name for this preset (e.g., Downstairs)
data_description.preset_zones: Select which zones this preset should activate

error.entity_not_found: Could not find ESPHome entities with this prefix. Ensure your ESPHome device is connected and the prefix is correct.
error.preset_name_reserved: This name is reserved and cannot be used.
error.preset_name_duplicate: A preset with this name already exists.
error.preset_name_conflicts_zone: This name conflicts with a zone name.
error.preset_zones_required: At least one zone must be selected.

abort.already_configured: This entity prefix is already configured.
